texto: I began to see that while equality often entailed women crossing the sexual divide between women's work and men's work, equality rarely meant that men crossed over the divide to the women's side: our side – women's – the side where work was largely, though not exclusively, unpaid or poorly paid care of dependents.
explicacao: Citação de Eva Feder Kittay sobre temas ligados a trabalho. “I began to see that while equality often entailed women crossing the sexual divide between women'…” articula trabalho, caregiving, dependency em registro de trabalho, com relevância para contextos como termino e trabalho.
